blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,842 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
